1.title: DynamoDB read capacity units
1.query:
timeseries read = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.capacity_units.consumed.read, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(read) desc
| limit 10

2.title: DynamoDB provisioned read capacity units
2.query:
timeseries read = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.capacity_units.provisioned.read, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(read) desc
| limit 10

3.title: DynamoDB read capacity units %
3.query:
timeseries read = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.capacity_units.read, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(read) desc
| limit 10

4.title: DynamoDB write capacity units
4.query:
timeseries write = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.capacity_units.consumed.write, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 10

5.title: DynamoDB provisioned write capacity units
5.query:
timeseries write = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.capacity_units.provisioned.write, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 10

6.title: DynamoDB write capacity units %
6.query:
timeseries write = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.capacity_units.write, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 10

7.title: DynamoDB number of write throttled events
7.query:
timeseries write = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.throttled_events.write, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 10

8.title: DynamoDB number of items returned by operation
8.query:
timeseries returned_items = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.requests.returned_items, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table, Operation }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(returned_items) desc
| limit 10

9.title: DynamoDB number of successful request latency for operation
9.query:
timeseries latency = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.requests.latency, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table, Operation }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(latency) desc
| limit 10

10.title: DynamoDB number of throttled requests for operation
10.query:
timeseries throttled = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.requests.throttled, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.dynamo_db_table, Operation }
| fieldsAdd dynamo_db_table_name = entityName(dt.entity.dynamo_db_table)
| sort arrayAvg(throttled) desc
| limit 10

11.title: Number of tables for AvailabilityZone
11.query:
timeseries tables = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.tables, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_availability_zone }
| fieldsAdd aws_availability_zone_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_availability_zone)
| sort arrayAvg(tables) desc
| limit 10

12.title: Number of tables for AvailabilityZone
12.query:
timeseries tables = avg(dt.cloud.aws.dynamo.tables, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_credentials }
| fieldsAdd aws_credentials_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_credentials)
| sort arrayAvg(tables) desc
| limit 10
